onboarding.bottomNavDeliveriesDesc: View expected deliveries and confirm when materials arrive. You can verify items, capture photos, and add signatures.
onboarding.bottomNavDesc: The navigation bar stays at the bottom for easy thumb access. Tap any icon to switch between sections. Swipe left or right to navigate quickly.
onboarding.bottomNavHubDesc: The Hub shows your daily overview with stats and quick actions. Start here every morning to see what's happening today.
onboarding.bottomNavInspectDesc: Perform quality inspections with checklists. Add photos, notes, and digital signatures to document your findings.
onboarding.bottomNavPhotosDesc: View all photos from daily activity logs organized by date. Perfect for tracking progress and reviewing site conditions.
onboarding.bottomNavReportDesc: Quickly report safety concerns, quality issues, or material problems. This is the fastest way to document issues on-site.
onboarding.completeDesc: You're ready to start using the Supervisor Portal. Remember, you can swipe between pages and all your work saves automatically even offline.
onboarding.profileMenuDesc: Tap your avatar to access settings, change language, switch themes, and log out. You can also see pending critical notifications here.
onboarding.quickActionsDesc: Tap these buttons for common tasks like logging daily activities and tracking crew time. These are your most-used features in one place.
onboarding.statsCarouselDesc: Swipe through your key metrics: today's deliveries, open issues, and pending inspections. This gives you a quick snapshot of what needs attention.
onboarding.welcomeCompleteDesc: Start exploring the Supervisor Portal. Swipe to see help tips anytime.
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Let's take a quick tour of the key features that will help you manage your construction site efficiently.

photoAnalysis.description: Use AI to scan recent jobsite photos for safety risks, quality issues, and progress updates.
photoAnalysis.title: AI Photo Analysis
